g.text: Enterprise AI Document Intelligence Architecture • Multi-Format Hybrid RAG Engine

g.g:
Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) Merges Dense + Sparse Ranks
RRF(c) = Σ 1 / (60 + rank(c)) <text x="26" y="96" font-family="system-ui, -apple-system, font-size="11" fill="#F1F5F9">Combined Pool: Top 30 Candidates <text x="26" y="112" font-family="system-ui, -apple-system, font-size="10" fill="#64748B">Passed to Cross-Encoder
